# yt-dlp Options Guide

Use this reference to decide download profiles and options.

## Output Types
- Video download (with audio)
- Audio-only extraction
- Subtitles and metadata only

## Quality Profiles
- Best: highest available resolution and bitrate
- Balanced: 720p/1080p where available with reasonable size
- Smallest: lowest acceptable resolution for quick previews

## Playlist Behavior
- Preserve order and index in filenames
- Optional: skip unavailable items while continuing

## Subtitle Guidance
- Prefer user-specified language if provided
- If missing, fall back to auto captions when available

## Metadata & Thumbnails
- Save metadata alongside media when requested
- Save thumbnails if the user asks for previews or catalogs
